title: POUNCE: a pure-Rust port of the Ipopt interior-point NLP solver
description: POUNCE is a pure-Rust port of the Ipopt (Interior Point OPTimizer) nonlinear programming solver. It solves continuous nonlinear optimization problems with equality and inequality constraints using a primal-dual interior-point method with a filter line search. The default build is pure Rust with no Fortran, HSL, or system BLAS dependencies; optional features link MA57 and other HSL solvers when available.
